value.found_quote: Record & Replay lets you demonstrate a workflow on your Mac and turn it into a reusable skill. Use it when the workflow is repetitive, depends on your preferences, or is easier to show than to describe in a prompt.
value.rationale: The page describes OpenAI's "Record & Replay" feature in the Codex app, which allows users to demonstrate and record multi-step workflows on their Mac and convert them into named, reusable "skills" that can be replayed later. This directly substantiates the claim of "Workflows / saved automations" — i.e., defining repeatable, named multi-step task sequences. The feature is described as currently available (on macOS, with noted geographic exclusions), indicating active status.
